questions.question: Voltage ki SI unit kya hai?

options.B: Volt

questions.explanation: Voltage ki SI unit Volt hoti hai, jo electrical potential difference ko measure karti hai.

questions.question: Ohm's Law ke according, current (I) ka formula kya hai?

options.B: I = V*R

questions.explanation: Ohm's Law ke anusaar, current (I) voltage (V) ke directly proportional aur resistance (R) ke inversely proportional hota hai, yani I = V/R.

questions.question: Ek circuit mein resistance ko measure karne ke liye kaunsa instrument use hota hai?

options.B: Voltmeter

questions.explanation: Resistance ko measure karne ke liye Ohmmeter ka upyog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: AC current ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Alternating Current

questions.explanation: AC ka full form Alternating Current hota hai, jismein current ki direction periodic tareeke se change hoti rehti hai.

questions.question: Electrical shock se bachne ke liye sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Circuit ko disconnect karna

questions.explanation: Electrical shock ki sthiti mein sabse pehle power source ko disconnect karna chahiye taaki current flow ruk jaaye aur aage ka nuksaan na ho.

questions.question: Power ki unit kya hai?

options.B: Watt

questions.explanation: Electrical power ki unit Watt hoti hai.

questions.question: Series circuit mein total resistance kaise calculate karte hain?
questions.explanation: Series circuit mein total resistance individual resistances ka sum hota hai.

questions.question: Earthing ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Voltage ko regulate karna

questions.explanation: Earthing ka mukhya uddeshya electrical appliances aur users ko fault current se bachakar electrical safety provide karna hai.

questions.question: Multimeter ka use kis liye kiya jata hai?

options.A: Sirf voltage measure karne ke liye
options.B: Sirf current measure karne ke liye
options.C: Voltage, current aur resistance measure karne ke liye
options.D: Sirf temperature measure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Multimeter ek versatile tool hai jo voltage, current aur resistance ko measure karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Ek 12V battery aur 3 Ohm resistor wale circuit mein kitna current flow hoga?

options.B: 36 Ampere

questions.explanation: Ohm's Law ke anusaar, I = V/R = 12V / 3 Ohm = 4 Ampere.

questions.question: Insulated tools ka use kyu zaroori hai electrical work mein?

options.A: Tools ko sundar banane ke liye
options.B: Electrical shock se bachav ke liye
options.C: Tools ki life badhane ke liye
options.D: Tools ko slip hone se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Insulated tools electrical shock se technician ko bachate hain, kyunki unki handle non-conductive material se bani hoti hai.

questions.question: Capacitor ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Electrical energy store karna

questions.explanation: Capacitor electrical charge ko store karta hai aur circuit mein energy storage device ki tarah kaam karta hai.

questions.question: Fuse ka kya role hota hai electrical circuit mein?

options.B: Overcurrent se circuit ko protect karna

questions.explanation: Fuse ek safety device hai jo overcurrent ya short-circuit ki sthiti mein circuit ko open karke protect karta hai.

questions.question: What does 'kW' stand for?

options.B: Kilo-Watt

questions.explanation: 'kW' Kilo-Watt ka abbreviation hai, jo power ki unit hai (1 kW = 1000 Watts).

questions.question: Parallel circuit mein total voltage kya hota hai?

options.B: Individual voltages ka sum
options.D: Total current par depend karta hai

questions.explanation: Parallel circuit mein har branch mein voltage same rehta hai, jo source voltage ke barabar hota hai.

questions.question: PVC insulation ka kya fayda hai electrical wires mein?

options.B: Heat generation kam karta hai
options.C: Electrical current leakage se bachata hai
options.D: Wire ko zyada flexible banata hai

questions.explanation: PVC (Polyvinyl Chloride) ek accha insulator hai jo wires ko short-circuit aur current leakage se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Ek 240V, 10A supply se kitni maximum power draw ki ja sakti hai?

options.B: 24 Watt

questions.explanation: Power (P) = Voltage (V) * Current (I). So, P = 240V * 10A = 2400 Watts.

questions.question: Battery capacity kis unit mein measure ki jaati hai?

options.B: Watts (W)

questions.explanation: Battery ki capacity Ampere-hours (Ah) mein measure ki jaati hai, jo batati hai ki battery kitne time tak kitna current deliver kar sakti hai.

questions.question: Lead-acid battery mein electrolyte ke roop mein kya use hota hai?

options.B: Sulfuric acid aur distilled water ka mixture

questions.explanation: Lead-acid battery mein electrolyte dilute sulfuric acid (sulfuric acid aur distilled water ka mixture) hota hai.

questions.question: Battery charging ke dauran, electrolyte ka specific gravity kya hota hai?

options.B: Badhta hai
options.D: Pehle badhta hai phir ghat ta hai

questions.explanation: Charging ke dauran, electrolyte mein sulfuric acid ki concentration badhti hai, jisse specific gravity badhta hai.

questions.question: Deep discharge se battery par kya asar padta hai?

options.B: Battery ki capacity badhti hai
options.C: Battery ko nuksaan hota hai aur life kam hoti hai

questions.explanation: Deep discharge se battery plates par sulfation hota hai, jisse battery ki capacity aur life kam ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Battery terminals ko clean rakhna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Battery ko sundar dikhane ke liye
options.B: Good electrical contact maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Battery ka weight kam karne ke liye
options.D: Battery ko garam hone se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Saaf terminals good electrical contact ensure karte hain, jisse charging aur discharging efficient hoti hai.

questions.question: SMF battery ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Standard Multi-Function

questions.explanation: SMF ka full form Sealed Maintenance Free hai, jo batata hai ki in batteries ko water topping ki zaroorat nahi hoti.

questions.question: Hydrometer ka use kis liye kiya jata hai?

options.A: Battery voltage check karne ke liye
options.B: Battery current check karne ke liye
options.C: Electrolyte ka specific gravity check karne ke liye
options.D: Battery ka temperature check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hydrometer electrolyte ke specific gravity ko measure karta hai, jo battery ke state of charge ko darshata hai.

questions.question: Battery ko series mein connect karne se kya hota hai?

options.A: Voltage badhta hai, Ah rating same rehti hai
options.B: Voltage same rehta hai, Ah rating badhti hai
options.C: Voltage aur Ah rating dono badhte hain
options.D: Voltage aur Ah rating dono kam hote hain

questions.explanation: Batteries ko series mein connect karne se total voltage badhta hai, jabki Ampere-hour (Ah) rating same rehti hai.

questions.question: Battery ko parallel mein connect karne se kya hota hai?

options.A: Voltage badhta hai, Ah rating same rehti hai
options.B: Voltage same rehta hai, Ah rating badhti hai
options.C: Voltage aur Ah rating dono badhte hain
options.D: Voltage aur Ah rating dono kam hote hain

questions.explanation: Batteries ko parallel mein connect karne se total voltage same rehta hai, jabki Ampere-hour (Ah) rating badhti hai.

questions.question: Battery charging ke liye kaunsa current type prefer kiya jata hai?

options.B: DC (Direct Current)

questions.explanation: Batteries ko charge karne ke liye DC (Direct Current) ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Overcharging se battery par kya asar padta hai?

options.B: Electrolyte level badhta hai
options.C: Battery overheat hoti hai, gas release karti hai aur life kam hoti hai
options.D: Battery ki internal resistance kam hoti hai

questions.explanation: Overcharging se battery overheat ho sakti hai, excessive gassing ho sakti hai aur battery ki life kam ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Battery room mein proper ventilation kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Battery ko thanda rakhne ke liye
options.B: Explosive gases ko bahar nikalne ke liye
options.C: Dust ko andar aane se rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Charging ke dauran batteries hydrogen gas release karti hain, jo explosive ho sakti hai. Proper ventilation isse bahar nikalne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Battery sulfation kya hota hai?

options.B: Battery plates par lead sulfate crystals ka build-up
options.D: Battery cells ka short-circuit ho jaana

questions.explanation: Sulfation tab hota hai jab battery plates par lead sulfate crystals jam jaate hain, jisse battery ki charging-discharging capability kam ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Normal operating conditions mein battery ka ideal temperature range kya hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Batteries ke liye 20-30°C ka temperature range ideal hota hai. Zyada high ya low temperature battery life par negative asar dalta hai.

questions.question: Lithium-ion batteries ke kya fayde hain lead-acid batteries ke comparison mein?

options.B: Zyada heavy hoti hain
options.C: High energy density aur long cycle life

questions.explanation: Lithium-ion batteries ki energy density zyada hoti hai, lighter hoti hain aur unki cycle life lead-acid batteries se behtar hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar battery cells mein water level low ho jaye, toh kya add karna chahiye?

options.B: Sulfuric acid

questions.explanation: Battery electrolyte level maintain karne ke liye sirf distilled water add karna chahiye, kyunki tap water mein impurities hoti hain jo battery ko nuksaan pahuncha sakti hain.

questions.question: Battery backup time ko kis factor se badhaya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Load badhakar
options.C: Higher Ah rating ki battery ya multiple batteries parallel mein connect karke

questions.explanation: Battery backup time badhane ke liye ya toh zyada Ah rating ki battery use karni chahiye ya multiple batteries ko parallel mein connect karke total Ah rating badhani chahiye.

questions.question: Inverter ka primary function kya hai?

options.A: AC ko DC mein convert karna
options.B: DC ko AC mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Inverter DC (battery) power ko AC power mein convert karta hai, jisse ghar ke appliances chalaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: UPS ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Uninterruptible Power Supply

questions.explanation: UPS ka full form Uninterruptible Power Supply hai, jo power cut hone par devices ko bina rukawat ke power supply karta hai.

questions.question: Kaunsa inverter type sensitive electronic appliances ke liye best hai?

options.B: Modified sine wave inverter

questions.explanation: Pure sine wave inverter grid power jaisa smooth aur clean output deta hai, isliye yeh sensitive electronics (jaise laptops, medical equipment) ke liye sabse accha hota hai.

questions.question: Inverter ki rating kis unit mein di jaati hai?

options.B: Amperes (A)

questions.explanation: Inverter ki rating Volt-Ampere (VA) mein di jaati hai, jo uski apparent power ko darshati hai.

questions.question: Ek inverter mein battery charger ka kya role hota hai?

options.B: AC mains se battery ko charge karna
options.C: DC ko AC mein convert karna
options.D: Load ko directly power supply karna

questions.explanation: Inverter mein battery charger AC mains power ka use karke battery ko charge karta hai.

questions.question: Modified sine wave inverter ka output kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Square wave aur pure sine wave ke beech ka

questions.explanation: Modified sine wave inverter ka output square wave se behtar hota hai, par pure sine wave jitna smooth nahi hota. Ismein steps hote hain.

questions.question: Inverter ki efficiency kis baat par depend karti hai?

options.B: Input DC voltage par
options.C: Kitni input power output power mein convert ho rahi hai

questions.explanation: Inverter ki efficiency yeh batati hai ki kitni input DC power ko successfully AC output power mein convert kiya gaya, bina zyada loss ke.

questions.question: Standby UPS kya hota hai?

options.B: Power cut hone par hi battery par switch karta hai
options.C: Sirf server rooms mein use hota hai
options.D: Battery ko kabhi charge nahi karta

questions.explanation: Standby UPS normal conditions mein mains power par chalta hai aur power cut hone par battery power par switch karta hai.

questions.question: Online UPS ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Switchover time zero hota hai

questions.explanation: Online UPS mein load hamesha inverter ke through power hota hai, jisse power cut hone par switchover time zero hota hai aur continuous power supply milti hai.

questions.question: Inverter ke cooling fan ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Inverter ke internal components ko thanda rakhna

questions.explanation: Inverter ke operation ke dauran heat generate hoti hai, cooling fan us heat ko dissipate karke components ko over-heating se bachata hai.

questions.question: Pure sine wave output ki frequency kya hoti hai?

options.B: Variable frequency

questions.explanation: Pure sine wave inverter ka output frequency grid standard ke according 50 Hz (India mein) ya 60 Hz hota hai.

questions.question: Power factor ka kya importance hai inverter selection mein?

options.A: Isko ignore kiya ja sakta hai
options.B: Yeh batata hai ki kitni real power use ho rahi hai
options.C: Yeh inverter ke weight ko decide karta hai
options.D: Yeh sirf DC systems ke liye important hai

questions.explanation: Power factor batata hai ki total apparent power (VA) mein se kitni real power (Watts) actually use ho rahi hai. Low power factor ka matlab hai ki zyada VA rating wale inverter ki zaroorat padegi real power load ko supply karne ke liye.

questions.question: Inverter mein 'Bypass Mode' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Inverter battery par chal raha hai
options.B: Inverter faulty hai
options.C: Load directly mains supply se chal raha hai, inverter use nahi ho raha

questions.explanation: Bypass mode mein inverter ka load directly mains supply se connect ho jata hai, aur inverter ka circuit inactive ho jata hai. Yeh maintenance ya fault ke dauran use hota hai.

questions.question: Solar Inverter ka primary kaam kya hai?

options.B: Solar panels se generate DC ko AC mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Solar inverter solar panels se generate ki gayi DC electricity ko AC electricity mein convert karta hai, jisse ghar aur grid ko power mil sake.

questions.question: Hybrid Inverter kya hota hai?

options.A: Sirf solar energy use karta hai
options.B: Sirf grid energy use karta hai
options.C: Solar panels, batteries aur grid ko manage kar sakta hai

questions.explanation: Hybrid inverter solar panels, batteries aur grid power sources ko intelligently manage karta hai, optimal energy utilization ke liye.

questions.question: Inverter ki output voltage ko check karne ke liye kaunsa setting use karenge multimeter par?

options.B: ACV

questions.explanation: Inverter ka output AC voltage hota hai, isliye multimeter ko ACV (Alternating Current Voltage) setting par set karna hoga.

questions.question: Ek 1000VA inverter kitne Watts ka load support kar sakta hai agar power factor 0.8 ho?

options.B: 800 Watts

questions.explanation: Real Power (Watts) = Apparent Power (VA) * Power Factor. So, 1000 VA * 0.8 = 800 Watts.

questions.question: Inverter installation ke liye sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Site survey aur load calculation karna

questions.explanation: Installation se pehle site survey aur load calculation karna zaroori hai, taaki sahi capacity ka inverter aur battery select kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Inverter ko kahan install karna chahiye?

options.B: Ventilated aur cool jagah par

questions.explanation: Inverter ko ventilated aur cool jagah par install karna chahiye, taaki over-heating na ho aur uski efficiency bani rahe.

questions.question: Battery aur inverter ke beech kaunse type ki cable use karni chahiye?

options.B: Thick, low resistance DC cables

questions.explanation: Battery aur inverter ke beech high current flow hota hai, isliye thick, low resistance DC cables use karni chahiye taaki voltage drop aur heat loss kam ho.

questions.question: Inverter installation mein earthing kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Inverter ki performance badhane ke liye
options.B: Electrical shocks se bachav ke liye
options.C: Battery charging speed badhane ke liye
options.D: Inverter ko aesthetic look dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Earthing electrical safety ke liye critical hai, yeh fault current ko zameen mein divert karke shock se bachata hai.

questions.question: MCB (Miniature Circuit Breaker) ka kya role hai inverter wiring mein?

options.B: Overcurrent aur short-circuit se protection provide karna
options.D: AC ko DC mein convert karna

questions.explanation: MCB ek safety device hai jo overcurrent ya short-circuit hone par circuit ko automatically trip karke protect karta hai.

questions.question: Inverter ko mains supply se connect karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Mains supply ko disconnect karna aur phir wiring karna
options.C: Wiring karte samay load on rakhna

questions.explanation: Electrical hazards se bachne ke liye, mains supply ko disconnect karna aur safety precautions lena bahut zaroori hai wiring karte samay.

questions.question: Battery ko inverter se connect karte samay polarity ka kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Positive ko negative se connect karna
options.C: Positive ko positive se aur negative ko negative se connect karna

questions.explanation: Sahi polarity (positive to positive, negative to negative) ka dhyan rakhna bahut zaroori hai, galat connection se inverter aur battery dono ko nuksaan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Load ko inverter se connect karte samay kya check karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Load ki VA rating inverter ki capacity se zyada na ho

questions.explanation: Inverter par overload se bachne ke liye, connected load ki total VA rating inverter ki capacity se zyada nahi honi chahiye.

questions.question: Agar inverter aur battery ke beech cable lambi ho, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Voltage drop aur heat loss badhega

questions.explanation: Lambi cables mein resistance zyada hota hai, jisse voltage drop aur heat loss badhta hai, aur system ki efficiency kam ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Battery bank ko secure kyu karna chahiye?

options.B: Physical damage aur accidental contact se bachane ke liye
options.C: Zyada garam hone se bachane ke liye
options.D: Zyada thanda hone se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Battery bank ko secure karna physical damage, accidental short-circuits aur acid spills se bachav ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Inverter system ke liye proper fuse selection kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Fuse ko sundar dikhane ke liye
options.B: System ko overcurrent se protect karne ke liye
options.C: System ki efficiency badhane ke liye
options.D: Voltage ko regulate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sahi rating ka fuse system ko overcurrent aur short-circuit se bachata hai, jisse equipment safe rehta hai.

questions.question: Inverter ke output terminals par kya check karna chahiye wiring ke baad?

options.B: Sahi AC voltage aur frequency

questions.explanation: Wiring complete hone ke baad, multimeter se inverter ke output terminals par sahi AC voltage (220-240V) aur frequency (50Hz) check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar ek inverter system mein multiple batteries hain, toh unhe kaise connect karna chahiye?

options.B: Sabhi ko series mein
options.D: Required voltage aur capacity ke according series aur parallel combination mein

questions.explanation: Multiple batteries ko inverter ki requirement ke hisaab se series aur parallel combinations mein connect kiya jata hai, taaki desired voltage aur Ah rating mil sake.

questions.question: Inverter installation ke liye kaunsa tool sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Multimeter

questions.explanation: Multimeter voltage, current aur continuity check karne ke liye sabse zaroori tool hai electrical installations mein.

questions.question: Inverter installation ke baad, first time power on karte samay kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Inverter ke indicators aur display par koi error code toh nahi hai

questions.explanation: First time power on karte samay inverter ke indicators aur display par koi error code ya warning check karna chahiye, taaki koi wiring ya internal fault detect ho sake.

questions.question: Inverter ke liye dedicated wiring kyu prefer ki jaati hai?

options.B: Existing wiring par load kam karne aur safety badhane ke liye
options.C: Inverter ko zyada garam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dedicated wiring existing circuits par load kam karti hai aur inverter ke output ko separate karke safety aur stability badhati hai.

questions.question: Agar inverter installation ke dauran koi spark ya smoke dikhe toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant power supply disconnect karna

questions.explanation: Spark ya smoke electrical fault ka indication hai, turant power supply disconnect karna chahiye safety ke liye.

questions.question: Agar inverter 'Overload' show kar raha hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Connected load inverter ki capacity se zyada hai
options.D: Mains supply nahi aa rahi hai

questions.explanation: Overload ka matlab hai ki inverter par uski rated capacity se zyada load connect kiya gaya hai.

questions.question: Inverter 'No Output' de raha hai, iska ek common reason kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Battery low ya disconnected hai
options.C: Inverter ka fan chal raha hai

questions.explanation: Agar battery low hai ya disconnected hai, toh inverter ko DC input nahi milegi aur woh AC output generate nahi kar payega.

questions.question: Battery jaldi discharge ho rahi hai, kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Battery ki capacity kam ho gayi hai ya load zyada hai
options.C: Inverter ka fan chal nahi raha

questions.explanation: Battery ka jaldi discharge hona uski ghat ti capacity (age, sulfation) ya us par zyada load hone ka sanket ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Inverter mein 'Mains Fail' indicator blink kar raha hai, iska kya matlab hai?

options.B: Inverter overload hai
options.C: Mains (grid) power supply available nahi hai

questions.explanation: Mains Fail indicator batata hai ki inverter ko grid power nahi mil rahi hai aur woh battery backup par switch ho gaya hai.

questions.question: Agar battery charge nahi ho rahi hai, toh kya check karna chahiye sabse pehle?

options.B: Mains input supply aur inverter ke charger section ko

questions.explanation: Battery charge na hone ka primary reason mains input supply ka na aana ya inverter ke charger section mein fault hona ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Battery terminals par white powdery substance kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Battery overheated hai
options.C: Corrosion, jo poor connection ka karan ban sakta hai
options.D: Battery ki life badh gayi hai

questions.explanation: White powdery substance corrosion hota hai, jo battery terminals par poor electrical contact aur resistance badha sakta hai.

questions.question: Inverter se humming noise aa rahi hai, kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Loose connections ya transformer mein issue

questions.explanation: Humming noise loose connections, transformer ke vibrations ya internal component issues ka sanket ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Electrical fire ko bujhane ke liye kaunsa extinguisher use karna chahiye?

options.B: Foam based extinguisher
options.C: CO2 (Carbon Dioxide) ya Dry Chemical (ABC) extinguisher

questions.explanation: Electrical fires (Class C) ke liye CO2 ya Dry Chemical (ABC) extinguisher use karna chahiye, kyunki water conductive hota hai aur aag ko badha sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar inverter 'Low Battery' error dikha raha hai, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Battery connections check karna aur charge hone ka wait karna

questions.explanation: Low battery error ka matlab hai ki battery ka charge level kam hai. Battery connections check karein aur use charge hone dein. Agar phir bhi problem aaye toh battery health check karein.

questions.question: Inverter se bad smell (jaise jali hui plastic) aa rahi hai, kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Internal component (jaise capacitor, transformer) burn ho raha hai

questions.explanation: Jali hui plastic ya kisi aur cheez ki bad smell internal component ke damage ya burning ka sanket hai, turant inverter ko band karna chahiye.

questions.question: Inverter ke fuse bar-bar udh rahe hain, kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Overload ya short-circuit hai circuit mein
options.C: Battery charging nahi ho rahi hai

questions.explanation: Fuses ka bar-bar udhna kisi bade overload ya short-circuit ka indication hai, jise investigate karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Battery acid spill hone par kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Neutralize karne ke liye baking soda solution use karna

questions.explanation: Battery acid corrosive hota hai. Spill hone par use baking soda aur paani ke solution se neutralize karna chahiye, phir saaf karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar inverter ka display kaam nahi kar raha, lekin inverter chal raha hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Display unit ya uski wiring mein fault

questions.explanation: Agar inverter functional hai lekin display blank hai, toh display unit ya uski internal wiring mein fault ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Safety glasses kyu pehenne chahiye battery maintenance karte samay?

options.B: Battery acid ke splashes se aankhon ko bachane ke liye
options.C: Battery ko saaf rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Battery acid corrosive hota hai aur aankhon ke liye bahut nuksaan deh. Safety glasses aankhon ko acid splashes se bachate hain.

questions.question: Multimeter se continuity check karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Current measure karna
options.C: Circuit mein break ya open circuit ko detect karna

questions.explanation: Continuity check se yeh pata chalta hai ki circuit mein electrical path complete hai ya kahi break (open circuit) hai.

questions.question: Loose electrical connections ke kya khatre hain?

options.B: Resistance badhna, overheating, sparks aur fire hazard

questions.explanation: Loose connections se resistance badhta hai, jisse heat generate hoti hai, sparks nikal sakte hain aur fire ka khatra badh jata hai.

questions.question: Customer ko inverter ke bare mein kya common advice deni chahiye?

options.B: Battery water level regularly check karo aur ventilated area mein rakho
options.C: Inverter ko direct sunlight mein rakho
options.D: Battery ko kabhi charge mat karo

questions.explanation: Customer ko battery water level check karne aur proper ventilation maintain karne ki salah deni chahiye, yeh battery life aur safety ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Energy efficiency badhane ke liye kya tip denge?

options.A: Zyada power consuming appliances use karo
options.B: LED lights use karo aur unnecessary appliances band rakho

questions.explanation: LED lights kam power consume karti hain aur unnecessary appliances ko band rakhne se overall energy consumption kam hota hai, jisse backup time badhta hai.

questions.question: Customer complaint ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.B: Dhyan se sunna, problem ko samajhna aur professional solution dena
options.D: Turant replace karne ki salah dena

questions.explanation: Ek acche technician ko customer ki baat dhyan se sunni chahiye, problem ko analyze karna chahiye aur professional tareeke se solution provide karna chahiye.

questions.question: Solar panel inverter system ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf raat mein kaam karta hai
options.B: Electricity bill kam karta hai aur environment-friendly hai
options.C: Zyada maintenance ki zaroorat padti hai
options.D: Sirf high-rise buildings ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Solar panel inverter systems renewable energy ka use karte hain, jisse electricity bill kam hota hai aur yeh environment ke liye acche hote hain.

questions.question: Inverter ki routine maintenance mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Dust cleaning, connections check karna, battery health monitoring

questions.explanation: Routine maintenance mein inverter ki dust cleaning, loose connections check karna aur battery ke water level/health ko monitor karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Customer ko battery ki expected life ke bare mein kya batana chahiye?

options.B: Battery life use, maintenance aur ambient temperature par depend karti hai
options.C: Battery life sirf brand par depend karti hai
options.D: Battery ko har saal replace karna padega

questions.explanation: Battery life kai factors par depend karti hai jaise use pattern (deep discharge), proper maintenance aur operating temperature.

questions.question: Multiple inverters ko parallel mein connect karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Output capacity badhti hai aur redundancy milti hai

questions.explanation: Parallel connection se total output capacity badh jaati hai aur agar ek inverter fail ho jaye toh baaki system chalte rehte hain (redundancy).

questions.question: Customer ko inverter system ki warranty terms explain karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Customer ko confuse karne ke liye
options.B: Future mein disputes se bachne aur transparency ke liye
options.D: Taki customer khud repair kar sake

questions.explanation: Warranty terms explain karne se customer ko apne rights aur responsibilities pata chalti hain, jisse future mein galatfehmi ya dispute nahi hota.

questions.question: Remote monitoring feature wale inverters ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Inverter ko physically inspect karna padta hai
options.B: System performance ko door se monitor aur troubleshoot kar sakte hain
options.C: Battery ko jaldi discharge karta hai
options.D: Sirf bade industrial setups ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Remote monitoring se technician ya user system ki performance, battery status aur faults ko remote location se check kar sakte hain, jisse maintenance asaan ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Customer ko inverter ke 'Eco Mode' ke bare mein kya batana chahiye?

options.A: Yeh inverter ko hamesha full power par chalata hai
options.B: Yeh power savings ke liye low load par inverter ko sleep mode mein daal deta hai
options.C: Yeh sirf battery charging ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Eco Mode (ya Power Saving Mode) mein inverter kam load par sleep mode mein chala jata hai, jisse battery power conserve hoti hai aur overall energy efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Technician ko customer feedback kyu lena chahiye?

options.B: Service ki quality improve karne aur customer satisfaction badhane ke liye
options.C: Complaint list lambi karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Customer feedback valuable hota hai service quality ko samajhne aur usmein sudhar karne ke liye, jisse customer satisfaction badhta hai.

questions.question: Inverter system ki documentation (manuals, warranty cards) kyu maintain karni chahiye?

options.B: Future troubleshooting, warranty claims aur correct usage ke liye
options.C: Sirf ghar ko decorate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Documentation future mein troubleshooting, warranty claims aur system ke correct operation ke liye bahut zaroori hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar customer ka inverter frequently trip ho raha hai, toh technician ko kya advice deni chahiye?

options.B: Connected load check karein aur kam karein, ya inverter capacity upgrade karein
options.D: Inverter ko hamesha bypass mode mein rakhein

questions.explanation: Frequent tripping overload ya short-circuit ka sanket hai. Customer ko load kam karne ya higher capacity ka inverter lagane ki salah deni chahiye.

questions.question: Inverter technician ko latest technology trends (jaise IoT enabled inverters) se update kyu rehna chahiye?

options.B: Customers ko better service aur solutions provide karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf apni knowledge badhane ke liye
options.D: Old technology zyada reliable hoti hai

questions.explanation: Latest technology trends se update rehne se technician advanced solutions provide kar sakta hai aur market mein competitive rehta hai.

questions.question: Customer ko battery ke liye proper ventilation ki importance kaise samjhayein?

options.B: Samjhayein ki charging ke dauran explosive gases nikalte hain, jinko bahar nikalna safety ke liye zaroori hai
options.C: Sirf temperature kam karne ke liye
options.D: Yeh sirf aesthetics ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Customer ko samjhana chahiye ki battery charging ke dauran hydrogen gas release karti hai, jo explosive ho sakti hai, isliye proper ventilation bahut zaroori hai safety ke liye.

questions.question: Ek professional technician mein kya quality honi chahiye?

options.B: Good communication skills, problem-solving ability aur customer focus

questions.explanation: Ek professional technician ke paas technical knowledge ke saath-saath acchi communication skills, problem-solving ability aur customer satisfaction par focus hona chahiye.
